name: Ventola Forced Convection Benchmark — 13.9 m/s
description: Forced-convection plate-fin heatsink benchmark mapped from Ventola et al. (2016), Table 3, high-velocity case.

provenance.citation: Ventola, L., Curcuruto, G., Fasano, M., Fotia, S., Pugliese, V., Chiavazzo, E., and Asinari, P. (2016). Unshrouded Plate Fin Heat Sinks for Electronics Cooling: Validation of a Comprehensive Thermal Model and Cost Optimization in Semi-Active Configuration. Energies, 9(8), 608.
provenance.notes: Expected outputs are anchored to Table 3 total thermal resistance values. The source area is inferred as an equivalent square from the reported 1.555 cm^2 transistor footprint, and the benchmark is expressed through junction temperature to preserve the paper's total-Rja comparison.

notes: Input dimensions are in UI units (mm). This case uses the published 13.9 m/s approach velocity from Table 3.
